channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 12 com severidade Alta
• 9 novas CVEs
• 6 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-45549 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.5
Resumo:
Roxy-WI is a web interface for managing Haproxy, Nginx, Apache and Keepalived servers. In versions 8.2.6.4 and prior, agent_action (app/routes/smon/agent_routes.py:166-179) has decorators @bp.post('/agent/action/ ') and @jwt_required() only — no role check, no group ownership check on the server_ip form field. Any authenticated user, including role 4 (guest), can start, stop, or restart the roxy-wi-smon-agent systemd...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45549
 
💣 Docker Hardened Images enhanced vulnerability scanning with Docker and Aikido
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Aikido now scans Docker Hardened Images (DHI) with built-in VEX support. Vulnerabilities that Docker has verified as non-exploitable drop out of the queue automatically, so developers spend their time on findings that actually matter. This post walks through what changed, why it matters, and how users can benefit from the new integration.
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/docker-hardened-images-enhanced-vulnerability-scanning-with-docker-and-aikido/
 
📰 Compliance work is overdue for a new approach
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
Elastic Security introduces agentic compliance in Agent Builder, starting with PCI DSS v4.0.1. Ask questions over live telemetry, inspect ES|QL evidence and scope claims, spot data gaps, and automate daily checks with Workflows — beyond dashboards.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/agentic-compliance-skills
 
📰 From M-21-31 to M-26-14: What US government agencies need to know now
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
M-26-14 sets a new compliance baseline for cybersecurity logging, shifting to a risk-based, outcome-driven approach. Agencies operating with distributed, open, and AI-powered platforms like Elastic are better positioned to meet the requirements.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/m-26-14-memorandum
 
📰 Modern Automation with VMware Cloud Foundation Part 2: Modern Infrastructure as Code with VCF
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In my last post, we learned about push-button automation with the UI provided by the SDDC Manager. We learned that the SDDC Manager allows us to manage the automation of new clusters, add new hosts into existing clusters, and that it can manage infrastructure across multiple vCenters Fleet-wide.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/11/modern-automation-with-vmware-cloud-foundation-part-2-modern-infrastructure-as-code-with-vcf/
 
📰 [TAM Blog] VMware Cloud Foundation® で実現する Kubernetes 運用【後編】
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
はじめに 皆さま、こんにちは。Broadcom の VCF-TAM 中山です。 前編の記事では、モダンアプリケーションの普及に伴い、インフラ担当者に求められる役割が「基盤 SRE (Site Reliability Engineering)」へと拡大している背景、そして VCF が提供する「VMware vSphere® Supervisor」（以降 Supervisor）というアーキテクチャの本質についてお話ししました。 「開発スピード」と「信頼性」を両立させるためには、プラットフォームの抽象化だけでなく、その中身を正確に把握する「可視性」が不可欠です。 後編となる今回は、VMware Cloud Foundation® Operations (以降 VCF Operations) を活用した Kubernetes 環境の具体的なモニタリング手法について解説します。ブラックボックス化しがちなコンテナ環境を、いかにして「クリアボ...
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/vmware-japan/2026/06/monitoring-k8s-from-vcfops-2.html
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Ivanti, Fortinet, and SAP Release Patches for Multiple Critical Vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Fortinet, Ivanti, and SAP have released security updates to address multiple critical security vulnerabilities that could result in arbitrary code execution and information disclosure. The security flaw patched by Fortinet relates to a command injection vulnerability in FortiSandbox, FortiSandbox Cloud, and FortiSandbox PaaS WEB UI. It's tracked as CVE-2026-25089 (CVSS score: 9.1).
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/ivanti-fortinet-and-sap-release-patches.html
 
🚨 Unpatched Langflow Flaw CVE-2026-5027 Exploited for Unauthenticated RCE
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
A high-severity unpatched security flaw in Langflow, an open-source low-code platform to build artificial intelligence (AI) applications, has come under active exploitation in the wild, according to findings from VulnCheck. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-5027 (CVSS score: 8.8), a case of path traversal that could allow an attacker to write files to arbitrary locations.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/unpatched-langflow-flaw-cve-2026-5027.html
 
🚨 CISA Adds Cisco, Chrome, and Arista Flaws to KEV Catalog Amid Active Exploitation
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday added three new vulnerabilities to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, following reports of active exploitation. The list of vulnerabilities is as follows - CVE-2026-20245 (CVSS score: 7.8) - An improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability in Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager that could allow an
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/cisa-adds-cisco-chrome-and-arista-flaws.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-42765 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Issue summary: When a partial-chain certificate verification is enabled together with OCSP response checking for the whole chain, a NULL dereference will happen if the verified chain does not have a self-signed trusted anchor, crashing the process. Impact summary: A NULL pointer dereference can trigger a crash which leads to a Denial of Service for an application. When performing OCSP response checking for certificat...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42765
 
💣 Check Point Warning: Actively Exploited VPN Zero-Day Linked to Qilin Ransomware - TechRepublic
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Check Point. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigwFBVV95cUxPcDdhV09ObGNJelhwbzAtUTJKcWRIbS1vQUdmRXZDTWM3anE4UFEwUVN5RHZHc0ltSk5rSUp6VHV6LUl2M2dzc2phRXNuZlE1Y2k2RmdxVFZBbmhlOUUtRklFdXYzS2swdW5BREp1QUI1bkl1VTEyQnJjVFZkN2FDeVNZZw?oc=5
 
💣 Max severity Ivanti Sentry vulnerability now exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers are now targeting a recently patched maximum-severity flaw in Ivanti Sentry, enabling them to execute code with root privileges on Internet-exposed secure mobile gateways.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/max-severity-ivanti-sentry-vulnerability-now-exploited-in-attacks/
 
💣 CISA tells govt agencies to patch critical exploited flaws in 3 days
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) announced a new Binding Operational Directive, 26-04, that prioritizes security updates for Federal Civilian Executive Branch (FCEB) agencies.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-tells-govt-agencies-to-patch-critical-exploited-flaws-in-3-days/
 
💣 CISA adds Check Point VPN bug to list of exploited vulnerabilities | news | SC Media - SC Media
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Check Point. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimwFBVV95cUxQUDJaSWdMX1NWcm1rM2RWTGpoaGJRSFRxRVNRQ3lIQ1U3bE40azVMQU9mZDQwNVZ3UThxMkI5OGdWR3BJX2ExLUpCZVNEODh3V1hGOWpOTDUyeDl2TlVYNlpCWFpRVEJzSWlUMWNZZXNjdk9DVHJ4TkNXNTl4a1FfZWZRa2xCQkF4NmtmdzB0bWlwQkc1Q3dtYVBHSQ?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-45602 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
No cwe for this issue in Windows DHCP Server allows an unauthorized attacker to perform tampering over a network.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45602
 
🚨 CVE-2026-3326 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.6
Resumo:
The Xstore WordPress theme before 9.7.3 does not properly sanitise and escape a parameter before using it in a SQL statement via an AJAX action available to unauthenticated users, leading to a SQL injection
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3326
 
🚨 CVE-2025-8444 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
The Animation Addons for Elementor – GSAP Powered Elementor Addons & Website Templates plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to DOM-Based Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the multiple parameters in all versions up to, and including, 2.6.7 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-8444
 
🚨 USN-6455-2: Exim regression
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 2.0
Resumo:
The fix for CVE-2023-42117 introduced a regression on Ubuntu 22.04 LTS that resulted in certain connections logging a Taint mismatch error. Original advisory details: It was discovered that Exim incorrectly handled validation of user-supplied data, which could lead to memory corruption. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2023-42117) It was discovered that Exim incorrectly...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-6455-2
 
💣 Microsoft Exchange Server 0-Day Vulnerability Exploited in Attacks Using Weaponized Email - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft June 2026 Patch Tuesday fixes 6 zero-days, 200 flaws - BleepingComputer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Windows Server, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 09/06/2026 até 11/06/2026.
